title: Fantastically Smoky British Bamboo Shoot Trifle
description: A smoky and comforting British dish featuring bamboo shoot, double-fry KFC style chicken, and Mediterranean-friendly flavors in a trifle form, served in a fondue pot.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the chicken with smoked paprika, olive oil, garlic, and lemon juice.
Double fry the chicken by first baking it in the oven for 20 minutes, then deep frying it in hot oil until crispy.
In a separate pan, saute the sliced bamboo shoots until they are lightly browned.
In a large fondue pot, create a layer of sauteed bamboo shoots.
Add a layer of double fried chicken on top of the bamboo shoots.
Add a layer of crumbled feta cheese and cherry tomatoes on top of the chicken.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of feta cheese on top.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
